name: Donuts
author: Bruno Cathala / AGP port
description: Donuts (Bruno Cathala, first playable as INSERT): a 6x6 board randomly assembled from four 3x3 tiles, every square carrying a horizontal / vertical / diagonal line. Place a ring; the line under it forces the direction of your opponent's next ring. Bracket a run of your rings with two enemy rings and they flip to your colour. Align 5 to win.
